title: Intrinsic default-executive coupling of the creative aging brain.

assets.abstract: Creativity refers to the ability to generate novel associations and has been linked to better problem-solving and real-world functional abilities. In younger adults, creative cognition has been associated with functional connectivity among brain networks implicated in executive control [fronto-parietal network (FPN) and salience network (SN)] and associative or elaborative processing default network (DN). Here, we investigate whether creativity is associated with the intrinsic network architectu

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.
